subcodes.first_line: O namesake of the Divine Purpose! A hundred thousand thanks to the Loving Lord, that on the Promised Day thou didst attain, and unto that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی حضرت مقصود صدهزار شکر رب ودود را که در یوم موعود فائز گشتی و بانچه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
